hero.subtitle: LM Essentials brings the finest products to market — technology, nutrition, beauty and more — delivered to every corner of the world where possible.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: A company built to export without limits
about.p1: At LM Essentials we believe the best products should have no borders. We specialize in exporting essential categories for modern life, with the highest quality standards and reliable logistics.
about.p2: We work directly with selected manufacturers and distributors to ensure every product we export meets the most rigorous international standards.
about.quote: "Our mission is to be the trusted bridge between the world's finest products and the markets that need them."

tech.name: Technology & IT
tech.desc: Equipment, components, accessories and cutting-edge technology solutions for global markets.

electronics.name: Consumer Electronics
electronics.desc: Electronic devices, gadgets and audio-video equipment with international warranty coverage.

nutrition.name: Proteins & Nutrition
nutrition.desc: Sports supplements, proteins and nutrition products certified under international standards.

perfumes.name: Perfumes & Fragrances
perfumes.desc: Exclusive fragrances and perfumery lines for luxury distributors and premium markets worldwide.

beauty.name: Beauty & Personal Care
beauty.desc: Cosmetics, skincare and personal care products from globally recognized brands.

vitamins.name: Vitamins & Health
vitamins.desc: Vitamins, minerals and natural supplements under international quality certifications.

markets.label: Global reach
markets.title: We export wherever the world allows
markets.subtitle: Our international distribution network allows us to reach the major markets of the Americas, Europe, Asia and beyond. If your country permits it, LM Essentials can get there.

latam.name: Latin America & the Caribbean
latam.desc: Mexico, Colombia, Brazil, Argentina and more

europe.name: Europe
europe.desc: Spain, Germany, France, Portugal and more

asia.name: Asia & Pacific
asia.desc: Selected markets with favorable trade regulations

contact.label: Contact us
contact.title: Ready to export with us?
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need and we'll provide a personalized quote. We work with importers, distributors and businesses from all over the world.

footer.desc: Connecting global markets with premium quality essential products.
